name: webapp-starter
description: Reference colony for a React + TypeScript + Express web application. Demonstrates SkDD skills for component scaffolding, API endpoint generation, deploy-preview automation, and bug triage.

skills.name: deploy-preview
skills.description: Deploy preview branches to staging and post the URL to the pull request.

skills.name: component-scaffold
skills.description: Create React components with co-located tests and Storybook stories.

skills.name: api-endpoint
skills.description: Scaffold REST API endpoints with input validation, error handling, and tests.

skills.name: bug-triage
skills.description: Triage bug reports into actionable GitHub issues with severity labels and reproduction steps.
